'''N11''' was one of twelve equally-sized zones on the northern hemisphere of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], a massive [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] built by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Like the other twenty-three hemispheres on the [[Space station/Legends|space station]], the zone covered 31.4 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] of the Death Star's circumference, was commanded from a [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]], and contained a number of sectors with designated purposes.<ref name="Technical companion" /> The Death Star, including zone N11, was destroyed in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="Destruction date" />
